title: M4SUB PACK
description: Modpack for playing on the m4sub server, which is part of the MEGATREX4 network
body:
# m4sub Pack

Modpack tailored for playing on the *m4sub* server — part of the MEGATREX4 network.

## Features

- Built-in m4sub Panorama that replaces the main menu background with a 360° view of our spawn
- Optimization mods for smoother performance
- Simple Voice Chat for proximity-based communication
- Support for 7TV and Streamotes to display emotes used on our server
- CIT functionality for custom item textures and models
- Preconfigured server IP — just install the pack and join instantly

Fully configured and ready to use. No extra setup required.


![server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FzDiim0O/images/6f92462b3ebfcd889988db4e35a24c42c7bb0a8f.png)
